description_long: This chest of drawers features a classic, vintage-inspired design with a light gray painted body and a contrasting dark wood grain top. The front showcases four spacious drawers, each adorned with ornate, curved handles and subtle decorative flourishes at the corners and base. The sides are plain with recessed paneling, while the back is constructed from a simpler, natural wood finish. The legs are gently curved, adding an elegant touch to the overall silhouette. The top surface is flat and sturdy, suitable for placing decorative items or everyday objects. The craftsmanship and materials suggest it is both functional and aesthetically pleasing, suitable for use in urban interiors or as a repurposed street-side furnishing.
description: A vintage-style chest of drawers with a light gray body, ornate handles, and a dark wood top. It features four drawers and elegant curved legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing four drawers with ornate handles and decorative lower trim.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain recessed panel and the dark wood grain top.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a simple, natural wood back panel with no decorative features.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a clear view of the paneling and top surface.
